description: obsidian-llm-wiki hooks — hot cache restore on session start, context restore after compaction, hot cache update on session end. Claude Code only; GitHub Copilot relies on the standing instruction in AGENTS.md instead.

hooks.prompt: If the output above contains wiki hot cache content (a '# Recent Context' section), silently absorb it as session context. Do not announce that you read it. Do not summarise it back to the user. Just have the context available for this session.

Context was just compacted. If the output above contains wiki hot cache content (a '# Recent Context' section), silently re-read it to restore recent wiki context. Do not announce this. Do not summarise it. Just restore the context.

hooks.command: VAULT="${VAULT_PATH:-${HOME}/obsidian_vault}"; [ -d "${VAULT}/Knowledge/wiki" ] && printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"Read %s/skills/wiki-hot/SKILL.md fully, then update Knowledge/wiki/hot.md to reflect this session. Keep total under 300 words. Preserve relevant context from previous sessions already in the file; drop what is now stale or superseded. Overwrite the file completely -- it is a rolling cache, not a journal. If nothing wiki-related happened this session, update Last Updated and note no wiki changes this session."}' "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}" || true
